name: ConnectionString
description: Builds a libpq connection string (CString) with plain-text password. Opens an Eto dialog to collect host/user/password; database and port come from canvas inputs.

inputParameters.name: CToggle
inputParameters.description: Set True to open the credentials dialog and test the connection

outputParameters.name: CString
outputParameters.description: Connection string with plain-text password (libpq format). Feed into downstream DB components.

outputParameters.name: ok
outputParameters.description: True if the connection test succeeded
